other_observers: Christian Nunes; Not certain of who found it. I believe we were the last to see it, in part because its favored area was closed off to public access the next day
description: A rather husky warbler with proportionately short tail and big bill. Crown striped black and buff. "Lowest" stripe was a black transocular stripe. Back and wings olive colored. Underparts buffy, brightest on throat, chest, and ventBehaviors: Skulking in dense leavesCall: don't remember. Christian Nunes picked out vocalization as that of WE WarblerPlumage: unknown
